review_id: # review_id: stable id (e.g. R001). review_date: YYYY-MM-DD within the last 8-12 weeks.
# scheme: one of the 4 manifest schemes. channel: app_store|play_store|kuvera|support_ticket|survey.
# rating: integer 1-5. review_text: NO PII (no names
channel: folio/PAN). language: ISO code e.g. en

review_text: SIP setup was quick but the expense ratio wasn't easy to find in the app.
Wanted to know cut-off time for same-day redemption; the info was buried.
Clear breakdown of equity vs debt allocation, helped me understand the fund.
The total expense ratio is mentioned in the fact sheet but the app never shows it upfront.
Got charged an exit load on a partial withdrawal and nobody explained the one-year rule clearly.
Works well for short-term parking, though I wish the same-day redemption cut-off was clearer.
Happy with the dynamic equity-debt mix, felt less volatile during market dips.
Tried to modify my SIP date twice and the request kept failing without a reason.
Good fund for long horizon but the app benchmark comparison chart loads very slowly.
NAV was not updated till late evening and my redemption value looked wrong all day.
The consolidated account statement mixes schemes and is hard to read for tax filing.
KYC and first investment were smooth, completed everything within a day.
Not sure how this differs from a small-cap fund, the category explanation could be better.
Reliable for emergency money but I had to dig to find the exit-load-free policy.
Requested a switch from regular to direct plan and it stayed pending for a week.
Achha diversified portfolio hai, par expense ratio ki jaankari aur saaf honi chahiye.
The app logs me out every few minutes and I cannot complete my SIP registration.
Liquid fund redemption cut-off time samajhna mushkil tha, support ne thodi der baad bataya.
Appreciate the automatic rebalancing, just want a clearer view of current allocation.
Raised a query about benchmark index and waited three days for a vague reply.
Glad I stayed invested, the fund category fits my long-term goals well.
Instant redemption is capped and the app does not explain the daily limit clearly.
Could not download the capital gains statement for the last financial year from the portal.
My SIP got debited twice in one month and reversing it took multiple follow-ups.
Asked when the exit load window ends and the agent gave an inconsistent answer.
Good place to park funds between investments, NAV mostly updates on time.
The hybrid approach suits a conservative investor like me, very satisfied overall.
Monthly portfolio disclosure is delayed compared to other platforms I use.
Hard to find which benchmark the fund tracks, had to search the offer document.
Support resolved my redemption timing doubt on the same call, good experience.
Want a simple chart showing the current equity to debt split inside the app.
Steady fund for my goals, only gripe is the slow KYC update process.
SIP amount badhane ki request baar baar fail ho rahi thi, kaafi pareshani hui.
The 1:30 pm cut-off for liquid fund is not shown prominently before placing a redemption.
Was not told about the exit load before switching out and got an unexpected deduction.
Setting up a monthly SIP was effortless and the reminders are helpful.
Like the fund returns over time, however the mobile app feels sluggish on older phones.
Tried downloading my account statement and the PDF kept failing to generate.
A sensible choice for someone new to mutual funds, wish the fee breakdown was clearer.
My KYC re-verification took longer than expected and held up a fresh investment.
